choices.name: chcSkipActualsandForecast
choices.choiceText: Skip editing further Actuals and Forecasts

formulas.name: flaMonthPriorStartDate
formulas.expression: DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, YEAR(TODAY())), IF(MONTH(TODAY()) = 1, 12, MONTH(TODAY()) - 1), 1 )

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!Loop_Forecast_List.Forecast_Month__c}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Funding_Award__r.Name}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!rcdUpdate.Update_Deadline_Date__c}

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Capital spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_Admin_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Admin spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Admin and Ancillary spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_of_Grant_Ancillary_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the cumulative actual/forecast Ancillary spend per month, from grant only

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_Validated_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Validated

fields.name: Forecast_LG_No_of_Homes_Assessed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Assessed

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

fields.name: Forecast_LG_No_of_Homes_Treated_With_At_Least_One_Measure_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes Treated With At Least One Measure

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

fields.name: Forecast_LG_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No of Homes to EPC C
fields.helpText: Cumulative, derive from post-installation SAP scores

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Forecast_Update_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!Loop_Forecast_List.Forecast_Month__c}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Funding_Award__r.Name}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!rcdUpdate.Update_Deadline_Date__c}

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Co_funding_A_A_Spend_Required
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Required_Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified as Suitable for Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Copy_1_of_Forecast_Update_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready for Installs to Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes with all Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Home_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText: No. of Homes To EPC C

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: RO_Forecast_Update_Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Total energy savings (SPs)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Header
fields.fieldText:
Monthly Update: Forecast for {!Loop_Forecast_List.Forecast_Month__c}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Funding_Award__r.Name}

{!Loop_Forecast_List.Parent_Baseline__r.Baseline_Version__c}

Update Due: {!rcdUpdate.Update_Deadline_Date__c}


All fields must be completed to save the form. If you have incomplete figures at the time of creating the first draft then enter 0 for that data and return to finish your update later. Updates cannot be edited after the due date


Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Please ensure all required fields are completed before submitting the form.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Grant_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (grant only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Grant_A_A_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (grant only).

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_funding_Capital_Spend
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of capital spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Co_funding_A_A_Spend_Required
fields.helpText: Enter the amount of Admin and Ancillary spend this month (co-funding only)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Required_Total_Co_funding_toward_on_gas_LCH_offer
fields.fieldText: Total Co-funding toward on-gas LCH offer

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_identified_suitable_for_retrofit
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Identified Suitable For Retrofit (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 1 - No. of Homes Identified as Suitable for Retrofit

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_No_of_homes_ready_for_installs_to_start
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Ready For Installs To Start (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 2 - No. of Homes Ready for Installs to Start

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_started_installations_KPI
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes Started Installations (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 3 - No. of Homes Started Installations

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_with_all_installations_completed
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes With All Installations Completed (* Required)
fields.helpText: KPI 4 - No. of Homes with all Installations Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Home_Completed_KPI
fields.helpText: KPI 5 - No. of Homes Completed

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Homes_to_EPC_C
fields.fieldText: No. of Homes To EPC C (* Required)
fields.helpText: No. of Homes To EPC C

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

fields.name: Forecast_Update_Energy_Savings
fields.helpText: Total energy savings (SPs)

validationRule.errorMessage: Value cannot be in the negative.

textTemplates.name: txt_Date_Clarification_Message
textTemplates.text: Please enter non-cumulative data only to represent progress made in this month only

textTemplates.name: txt_Resubmission_Text
textTemplates.text:
Please adjust and resubmit your report for the following reasons:

{!rcdUpdate.Resubmission_Request_Details__c}
